### Post by hcwegge on 2008-04-22
Hi,
Im having problems getting my desktop on to my tv witch is an AOC 32'' LCD. My graphics-card is NVIDIA GEFORCE GO 7400 and I'm usin a VGA-cable to connect to the tv. Using nvidia-settings i can get a picture onto the tv but the max resolution I can chose is 640 x ??...

This is the output of xorg.conf
